release_notes: V14.39 build 184 extended trend and insulin history patch: adds selectable 4h, 8h, 12h and 24h history windows for the Trend and Insulin Activity screens, uses 5-minute spacing for history windows above 4 hours to protect ESP32 memory and performance, refreshes cached trend/insulin data when the selected window changes, and preserves the build 183 WiFi/Nightscout recovery improvements.
